hero.title: The Waterloo Inn
hero.description: More Than a Pub – The Heart of Biggin for Over 200 Years! A traditional Peak District pub with a rustic campsite, large beer garden and stunning panoramic countryside views.

about.title: A Traditional Derbyshire Pub with a View
paragraphs:
For more than two centuries the Waterloo Inn has stood on Main Street, serving the farming village of Biggin and travellers on the old turnpike. 
Today under new ownership and investment we continue that warm welcome for walkers, cyclists, families, and locals alike. It has been revitalised as a meeting place with quiz nights, Sunday roasts, dominoes, darts, music nights and above all some welcoming good laughs.

Up in the village of Biggin, we look out across miles of rolling farmland and open countryside. In our opinion it's one of the best spots for a pint in the whole Peak District for walkers, cyclists, four legged friends are welcome!

Our campsite brings new friends into the Waterloo community, we have a unique mix of friendly locals and regular visitors that make the Waterloo a special place. Pop in after a walk or make a weekend of it on the campsite. Inside you'll find cosy fires, well-kept real ales and proper home-cooked food.
New owners (Nov 2025) continuing the tradition while preserving the character.
about.imageAlt: Heritage corner at The Waterloo Inn featuring a framed sketch of the pub, horse brasses and historical photos

beerGarden.title: One of the Best Beer Gardens in the Peak District
paragraphs: Our beer garden looks out over proper Derbyshire countryside. Grab a pint, sit back and take it all in. On a clear day you won't want to leave.
Few pubs combine space, scenery and atmosphere quite like The Waterloo Inn.

food.title: Hearty Food & Fine Ales
food.description: Proper pub grub, cooked fresh. The kind of food you want after a day on the hills. Washed down with real ales and a glass of something nice.

previewItems.name: Napoleon's Retreat
previewItems.description: Cottage pie, beef slowly cooked in gravy topped with buttery mash

previewItems.name: The Waterloo Toastie
previewItems.description: Ham, mature cheddar & wholegrain mustard mayo on a bloomer

previewItems.name: Beef & Blue Ciabatta
previewItems.description: Derbyshire beef with rich gravy, Peak Blue & onion jam

campsiteTeaser.title: Peak District Camping with a View
campsiteTeaser.description: Our campsite sits right next to the pub. Spend the day out on the hills, then wander back for a bite to eat and a pint as the sun goes down.
features: Peak District routes on your doorstep
